name: Vinegar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and flour in a bowl.
2. Gradually add the cold water, vinegar, butter, and beaten eggs to the mixture.
3. Place the batter in a saucepan and cook over medium heat until it thickens.
4. Pour the cooked filling into a prepared pie crust.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) until the crust is golden brown.
